title: XDS: extensible data security policy constraining a table through a policy query
instruction: In the sandbox model, constrain data with an XDS policy. Ground it first with get_knowledge(topic="security"). Create: (1) a table DemoTerritory (label @TaxTransactionInquiry:HeaderNote, table group Main) with fields TerritoryCode (String, EDT Num, mandatory) and OwnerUserId (EDT UserId), plus a unique alternate-key index TerritoryIdx on TerritoryCode - this is the PRIMARY table of the policy; (2) a table DemoTerritoryLine with fields TerritoryCode (EDT Num) and LineNum (EDT LineNum), a unique index on both, and a table relation to ConDemoTerritory on TerritoryCode - the constrained table; (3) an AOT query DemoTerritoryPolicyQuery over ConDemoTerritory (DynamicFields=Yes) whose range on OwnerUserId resolves to the current user, so the policy is per user; (4) a security policy DemoTerritoryPolicy (d365fo_file objectType "security-policy") with PrimaryTable=ConDemoTerritory, Query=ConDemoTerritoryPolicyQuery, ConstrainedTable=Yes, Enabled=Yes and one constrained-table entry for ConDemoTerritoryLine carrying its TableRelation. All four objects must build with zero BP errors.
